name: Baytex Energy Corp Common Shares
summary: Baytex Energy Corp. is an oil and gas company focused on the acquisition, development, and production of crude oil and natural gas in North America. Headquartered in Calgary, Alberta, Canada, Baytex operates primarily in the Western Canadian Sedimentary Basin and in the Eagle Ford in the United States. The company's operations involve the exploration, extraction, and transportation of oil and gas resources.
